obsbase
=======

.. py:module:: obsbase


Submodules
----------

.. toctree::
   :maxdepth: 1

   /autoapi/obsbase/base/index
   /autoapi/obsbase/file/index
   /autoapi/obsbase/note/index

Classes
-------

.. autoapisummary::

   obsbase.Vault
   obsbase.Base
   obsbase.Note


Package Contents
----------------

.. py:class:: Vault(path)

   Represents an Obsidian vault.

   A vault provides access to Markdown notes and Obsidian Base files.

   Parameters
   ----------
   path : str | Path
       Path to the root directory of the vault.


   .. py:attribute:: path


   .. py:method:: notes() -> collections.abc.Iterator[obsbase.note.Note]

      Iterate over all Markdown notes in the vault.

      Yields
      ------
      Note
          Each Markdown note found recursively in the vault.



   .. py:method:: base(filename)

      Load a Base definition.

      Parameters
      ----------
      filename : str
          Relative path to the `.base` file.

      Returns
      -------
      Base
          The loaded Base object.



.. py:class:: Base(vault, path)

   Represents an Obsidian Base definition.

   A Base contains one or more views that can be executed against a vault.


   .. py:attribute:: vault


   .. py:attribute:: path


   .. py:attribute:: views


   .. py:method:: run(index=0)

      Execute a view.

      Parameters
      ----------
      index : int, default=0
          Index of the view to execute.

      Returns
      -------
      ResultSet
          Matching notes.



.. py:class:: Note(path, vault)

   .. py:attribute:: path


   .. py:attribute:: vault


   .. py:attribute:: _metadata


   .. py:attribute:: _content


   .. py:attribute:: file


   .. py:property:: name


   .. py:property:: folder

      Nom du dossier contenant la note.



   .. py:property:: frontmatter


   .. py:property:: content


   .. py:method:: __getitem__(key)


   .. py:method:: get(field)
